scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @drawhunt/shared && concurrently -n shared,api,web -c blue,cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace @drawhunt/shared" "npm run dev --workspace @drawhunt/api" "npm run dev --workspace @drawhunt/web"
scripts.dev:api: npm run build --workspace @drawhunt/shared && concurrently -n shared,api -c blue,cyan "npm run dev --workspace @drawhunt/shared" "npm run dev --workspace @drawhunt/api"
scripts.dev:web: npm run build --workspace @drawhunt/shared && npm run dev --workspace @drawhunt/web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @drawhunt/shared && npm run build --workspace @drawhunt/api && npm run build --workspace @drawhunt/web
scripts.build:api: npm run build --workspace @drawhunt/shared && npm run build --workspace @drawhunt/api
scripts.build:web: npm run build --workspace @drawhunt/shared && npm run build --workspace @drawhunt/web
